videos.headline: Georgia Tech shocks No. 17 Miami with 44-yard TD in final seconds
videos.description: Tyler Van Dyke finds Christian Leary in the final seconds to clinch an astonishing win for Georgia Tech.

videos.headline: Miami's coaching blunder leads to epic Georgia Tech comeback
videos.description: Miami's choice to run the ball leads to a crucial fumble, which Georgia Tech recovers and later completes the miracle comeback.
